raw_consumer_statement: I purchased XXXX XXXX tickets on XXXX XXXX XXXX and cancelled them right away. Amex and XXXX said it would take up to 8 days for the funds to be returned. Going into XXXX I made several calls and was on several chats with both Amex and XXXX XXXX and I was told that XXXX XXXX on XX/XX/2024 charged a separate charge for the same amount and has not returned the funds. When I spoke with XXXX, they did not see a XXXX charge and they also refused to talk with Amex to authorize the release of the funds because they said it was release XXXX hours after the cancellation had been made. Amex refused to release the funds and I had to call and chat several times over a month. It was thousands of dollars! The day after a payment was due, they released the funds and charged a late fee of XXXX to my account for non payment. The funds all of a sudden released with no problem today XX/XX/XXXX. In the mean time, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX and because the funds were not put back in a timely mannerXXXX I lost not only the money, but also affordable plane tickets for them AND an appropriate XXXX because by the time the funds were back in the account, which happened today, all the accommodations to fit the students were sold out. That there is no consequence for a big company when they do wrong but I have to pay a XXXX late fee when they do not after they do not return funds in the time they say they are suppose to is unconscionable. All I asked was for the XXXX fee be waived for all this trouble and they denied the request. Now I will not use the card because I do not trust that they have my best interest in mind and they do not care how much they ruin your life with their mistakes.
